mapper.select: SELECT /* /appform/checkMpCallCount : McpMplatformMapper.selectCheckMpCallCount 당일 MP호출 수 */ count(*) FROM MCP_MPLATFORM_LOG@DL_MCP WHERE 1=1 AND EVENT_CODE = #{eventCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND SYS_DT = TO_CHAR(sysdate , 'YYYYMMDD') AND ACCESS_URL IS NOT NULL
